the_polyrhythm_set: Seven against four, the war in the beat / Numbers are dancing on the digital street
Five in the space of the three and the one / The rhythmic eclipse of the binary sun
Syncopated shadows, moving in the dark / Finding the ghost in the machine's spark
the_groove_set: Twelve-eight pulse in a four-four world / The banner of chaos is finally unfurled
Lock to the ghost-note, follow the swing / The message of numbers is the only thing
Micro-time shifting, plus five, minus three / The heartbeat of the singularity
the_rhythmic_dialogue: Break the grid / Find the flow
What you hid / Now I know
